title: Adding informational group
excerpt: Hello, is there a way I can add a group to the top of the project board that only has information, and not tasks? I want viewers to be able to see updated information on the project but not edit it. I don’t want it to lo…

posts.author: gabrielledagosta (Gabrielle)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, is there a way I can add a group to the top of the project board that only has information, and not tasks? I want viewers to be able to see updated information on the project but not edit it. I don’t want it to look like a task group. Thanks!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, you can achieve this in Monday.com with a few creative workarounds, since there’s no “info-only group” feature by default. Here’s how to do it:

Option 1: Create an “Info” Group at the Top

  1. Add a New Group at the top of your board.
  2. Rename it to something like: 📌 Project Info or ℹ️ Read Me.
  3. Inside the group:
  • Add a single item called “Click here for project details” or similar.
  • Use the Updates section (the speech bubble icon) to write your project summary, links, goals, timelines, etc.
  • You can format text and even attach files in updates.
  1. Lock the Group:
  • Click the three-dot menu (⋯) next to the group name.
  • Choose “Restrict group editing” to make it view-only for viewers or members (only owners/admins can edit).

Option 2: Use a Board Description or Dashboard Widget (for Viewers)

  • If you don’t want this to show up like a group at all:
    • Use a Board Description (click the board title > “About this board”).
    • Or, build a Dashboard with a Text Widget or Note Widget showing project info — and share that view with your viewers.

Bonus Tips:

  • Use emojis () to make the info group visually distinct from task groups.
  • Collapse the info group by default so it’s tidy, but accessible.
  • Pin important updates to the top of the Updates feed for quick reference.

Let me know if that helps with a like or reply if you’d like help formatting the update or setting permissions!
